productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Dictate  White Sports Shoes
description: Get more comfort and enjoyment out of your fitness training with the nike Air Dictate running shoes. Packed with performance features, the Nike Air Dictate is a great choice for your daily runs. These attractive light-as-air shoes are the perfect blend of style and comfort, designed to up your performance.UpperBreathable sandwich mesh upper with synthetic overlays for breathabilty and supportNo-sew overlays in the midfoot offers a secure, irritation-free feelExtra heel support to lock the backfoot in place and protect it from injuriesPadded lining for a comfortable step in feelPadded tongue and collar for added comfortLace-ups for snug Fit and to lock the foot in placeMesh tongue for breathabilitySwoosh logo on the sides to create a style statementMidsoleAir cushioning unit in the pylon midsole guarantees a smooth and responsive rideMedial and lateral Air-Sole midsole units deliver supreme cushioningOutsoleBRS 1000 durable rubber outsole for long-lasting wearWaffle-pattern grip for excellent tractionHeel crash pad helps reduce impacting shock and set the foot up for a smooth transitionTPU shank adds extra supportshoe careDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
